scripts.dev: zsh -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && node scripts/dev.mjs'
scripts.build: zsh -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && next build'
scripts.start: zsh -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && next start'
scripts.lint: zsh -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && next lint'
scripts.fetch-images: zsh -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 >/dev/null && node scripts/fetch-trip-images.mjs'
